view.title: Validate persona scenario #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the stress test scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the stress test scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the stress test scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of a stress test involving 1000 concurrent queue entries. However, there is no evidence provided that directly confirms the system's behavior under this specific load, nor is there a clear report of the outcome from the test. The expected result of either confirming the scenario behavior or producing a failure report is not supported by the existing evidence, leading to an inconclusive status.
